info.title: PPUNDOC
info.description: Undocumented Power Platform APIs — BAP, Flow, Dataverse, Power Apps, Licensing, Admin Analytics, Environment Management, and Tenant Administration. 117 endpoints mapped, tested, and catalogued by ppundoc.com. WARNING: These are undocumented APIs that may change without notice.

get.description: Returns current tenant information including ID, geo, and language.

post.description: Update Power Platform tenant-level settings.
